Solution 17

Professional Services

CrewTEC delivers comprehensive professional services across the full IT lifecycle -- from migrating workloads to the cloud and implementing disaster recovery to modernising infrastructure with open-source virtualisation and providing ongoing managed services. Our certified engineers work on-site and remotely across India.

Key Vendors & Brands

CL
Cloud Migration Workload Migration
＋ View details
CL

Cloud Migration

Workload Migration

CrewTEC moves your on-premises workloads to AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure with minimal disruption -- covering assessment, planning, migration execution, and post-migration optimisation.

Key Features

  • Workload discovery and migration readiness assessment
  • Lift-and-shift, re-platform, and re-architect approaches
  • Zero-downtime migration using live replication
  • Post-migration performance tuning and cost optimisation
  • Support for VMware, Hyper-V, and bare-metal migrations

Use Cases

  • ✓ Migrate on-premises ERP and databases to cloud with zero data loss
  • ✓ Move VMware virtual machines to cloud-native infrastructure
  • ✓ Consolidate multiple data centres into a single cloud environment
Why CrewTEC recommends Cloud Migration

CrewTEC has delivered cloud migrations for enterprises across BFSI, manufacturing, and healthcare -- using a structured, low-risk methodology that keeps your business running throughout.

Interested in Cloud Migration? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Cloud Migration →
BA
Backup & Recovery Data Protection Services
＋ View details
BA

Backup & Recovery

Data Protection Services

CrewTEC designs and implements enterprise backup and recovery solutions -- ensuring your data is protected, recoverable, and regularly tested so that recovery is fast and complete when it matters.

Key Features

  • Backup architecture design for physical, virtual, and cloud workloads
  • Implementation of Rubrik, Cohesity, Veeam, or open-source solutions
  • Backup policy design with defined RPO and RTO targets
  • Regular backup testing and recovery validation
  • Offsite and cloud-based backup replication

Use Cases

  • ✓ Design a backup strategy meeting RTO of 1 hour and RPO of 15 minutes
  • ✓ Implement ransomware-resilient immutable backup for all critical workloads
  • ✓ Consolidate multiple backup tools into a single unified platform
Why CrewTEC recommends Backup & Recovery

A backup that has never been tested is not a backup. CrewTEC implements backup solutions and conducts regular recovery tests -- so your team is always ready when disaster strikes.

Interested in Backup & Recovery? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Backup & Recovery →
DI
Disaster Recovery DR Planning & Implementation
＋ View details
DI

Disaster Recovery

DR Planning & Implementation

CrewTEC designs, builds, and tests disaster recovery environments -- ensuring critical systems fail over to a secondary site or cloud within defined RTO and RPO targets.

Key Features

  • DR strategy and gap analysis
  • DR site design -- on-premises, colocation, or cloud
  • Replication setup using Zerto, Veeam, or Nutanix Leap
  • Automated failover orchestration and runbook development
  • Regular DR drills and test failover validation

Use Cases

  • ✓ Build a cloud-based DR site for on-premises critical systems
  • ✓ Achieve sub-1-hour RTO for tier-1 applications
  • ✓ Conduct annual DR drills to validate recovery readiness
Why CrewTEC recommends Disaster Recovery

DR without testing is just theory. CrewTEC builds DR environments and runs live failover drills so you have confidence that your recovery will work when it matters most.

Interested in Disaster Recovery? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Disaster Recovery →
BU
Business Continuity (BCP) BCP Planning & Advisory
＋ View details
BU

Business Continuity (BCP)

BCP Planning & Advisory

CrewTEC provides BCP services -- identifying critical processes, assessing risks, designing resilient architectures, and producing documented plans that are tested and audit-ready.

Key Features

  • Business impact analysis (BIA) and risk assessment
  • Critical system and process identification
  • BCP documentation and playbook development
  • Failover architecture design aligned to BCP requirements
  • BCP testing, tabletop exercises, and audit support

Use Cases

  • ✓ Develop a BCP satisfying RBI, SEBI, or ISO 22301 audit requirements
  • ✓ Identify single points of failure in current infrastructure
  • ✓ Run tabletop exercises to validate BCP with key stakeholders
Why CrewTEC recommends Business Continuity (BCP)

Regulators increasingly require documented, tested BCPs. CrewTEC brings both technical infrastructure expertise and process knowledge to produce BCPs that are practical, not just compliant.

Interested in Business Continuity (BCP)? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Business Continuity (BCP) →
OP
Open-Source Virtualisation Proxmox / KVM / OpenStack
＋ View details
OP

Open-Source Virtualisation

Proxmox / KVM / OpenStack

CrewTEC deploys and supports open-source virtualisation -- Proxmox VE, oVirt, KVM, and OpenStack -- enabling enterprises to eliminate expensive VMware licensing while retaining enterprise capabilities.

Key Features

  • Proxmox VE cluster deployment and configuration
  • KVM-based virtualisation on bare-metal infrastructure
  • oVirt enterprise virtualisation deployment
  • OpenStack private cloud design and deployment
  • Migration from VMware vSphere to Proxmox or KVM

Use Cases

  • ✓ Migrate from VMware vSphere to Proxmox and eliminate licensing costs
  • ✓ Build a private cloud using OpenStack on existing hardware
  • ✓ Deploy Proxmox HA cluster for cost-effective high-availability virtualisation
Why CrewTEC recommends Open-Source Virtualisation

With VMware licensing costs rising dramatically, open-source virtualisation is now the preferred path. CrewTEC has hands-on expertise in Proxmox, KVM, and OpenStack migrations.

Interested in Open-Source Virtualisation? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Open-Source Virtualisation →
SE
Server & Storage Deployment Infrastructure Deployment
＋ View details
SE

Server & Storage Deployment

Infrastructure Deployment

CrewTEC provides end-to-end server and storage deployment -- from rack and stack through configuration, OS installation, storage zoning, and handover for all major OEM brands.

Key Features

  • Physical rack and stack of servers and storage
  • BIOS, RAID, and firmware configuration
  • OS installation and baseline hardening
  • SAN zoning and storage volume allocation
  • Documentation and as-built diagrams

Use Cases

  • ✓ Deploy a new HPE, Dell, or Supermicro server fleet with full configuration
  • ✓ Integrate new storage arrays into existing SAN fabric
  • ✓ Refresh data centre infrastructure with full rack-and-stack service
Why CrewTEC recommends Server & Storage Deployment

CrewTEC engineers deploy servers and storage from every major OEM -- delivering fully configured, documented, and tested infrastructure ready for production on day one.

Interested in Server & Storage Deployment? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Server & Storage Deployment →
NE
Network Design & Implementation LAN / WAN / SD-WAN
＋ View details
NE

Network Design & Implementation

LAN / WAN / SD-WAN

CrewTEC designs and implements enterprise network infrastructure -- from campus LAN/WAN to data centre switching fabrics and SD-WAN -- covering planning, deployment, testing, and documentation.

Key Features

  • Network architecture design and IP addressing
  • Campus LAN switching and Wi-Fi deployment
  • Data centre spine-leaf fabric implementation
  • SD-WAN deployment for branch connectivity
  • Routing, BGP, and OSPF configuration

Use Cases

  • ✓ Design and build a new campus network from scratch
  • ✓ Migrate legacy WAN to SD-WAN for cost reduction
  • ✓ Implement a data centre spine-leaf fabric for east-west scalability
Why CrewTEC recommends Network Design & Implementation

CrewTEC network engineers hold certifications across Cisco, Arista, Juniper, and Aruba -- delivering scalable, resilient, and properly documented network designs.

Interested in Network Design & Implementation? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Network Design & Implementation →

Security Architecture Security Design & Deployment
＋ View details
SE

Security Architecture

Security Design & Deployment

CrewTEC designs and implements security architectures -- from Zero Trust design and firewall deployment to endpoint security rollouts and SOC setup -- aligned to your risk profile and compliance requirements.

Key Features

  • Security architecture review and gap assessment
  • Zero Trust architecture design and implementation
  • Firewall and network security deployment
  • Endpoint security rollout and policy configuration
  • SOC setup with SIEM deployment and use case development

Use Cases

  • ✓ Design a Zero Trust architecture to replace legacy perimeter security
  • ✓ Deploy firewalls, endpoint security, and SIEM as a complete stack
  • ✓ Conduct a security architecture review ahead of ISO 27001 audit
Why CrewTEC recommends Security Architecture

CrewTEC security architects combine deep product knowledge with real-world experience -- designing architectures that are practical to operate, not just theoretically sound.

Interested in Security Architecture? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

IT
IT Infrastructure Audit Health Check & Assessment
＋ View details
IT

IT Infrastructure Audit

Health Check & Assessment

CrewTEC conducts comprehensive IT infrastructure audits -- assessing health, capacity, security posture, and risk with a detailed findings and recommendations report.

Key Features

  • Server, storage, and network health assessment
  • Capacity planning and growth forecasting
  • Vulnerability and security posture assessment
  • Configuration compliance review (CIS, NIST)
  • Executive summary and technical findings report

Use Cases

  • ✓ Get an independent infrastructure health view before a major refresh
  • ✓ Identify capacity bottlenecks before they cause performance issues
  • ✓ Produce an audit report for board, regulator, or insurance requirements
Why CrewTEC recommends IT Infrastructure Audit

An infrastructure audit from CrewTEC gives you an honest, independent assessment -- not a sales pitch. We tell you what needs attention and what can wait.

Interested in IT Infrastructure Audit? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

MA
Managed Services Ongoing Infrastructure Management
＋ View details
MA

Managed Services

Ongoing Infrastructure Management

CrewTEC managed services provide ongoing monitoring, patching, performance management, and support for your IT infrastructure -- freeing your team to focus on business outcomes.

Key Features

  • 24/7 infrastructure monitoring with alerting
  • Patch management for servers, storage, and network
  • Performance management and capacity reporting
  • Incident response and break-fix support
  • Monthly service review and reporting

Use Cases

  • ✓ Offload day-to-day infrastructure management to CrewTEC
  • ✓ Get 24/7 monitoring and alerting without hiring a night shift
  • ✓ Ensure patch compliance across all servers and network devices
Why CrewTEC recommends Managed Services

CrewTEC managed services give you enterprise-grade infrastructure operations without the cost of a full internal team -- available 24/7, accountable by SLA.

Interested in Managed Services? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Managed Services →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Migrate on-premises workloads to cloud with zero data loss and minimal downtime
  • ✓ Implement DR with sub-1-hour RTO for critical business applications
  • ✓ Replace VMware with Proxmox or KVM and eliminate expensive licensing
  • ✓ Build and test a BCP that satisfies regulatory audit requirements
  • ✓ Get 24/7 managed monitoring and support for your entire infrastructure
  • ✓ Conduct an independent IT audit before a board review or compliance assessment

Key Features

Certified engineers with 25+ years of combined IT infrastructure experience

Vendor-neutral -- we recommend the right solution, not the most expensive one

End-to-end ownership from design to deployment to handover

Pan-India delivery with on-site support across major cities

Fixed-price and outcome-based engagement models available

Post-deployment support and managed services included
